scripts.build:views: cd web && for f in view-*.js notification-service.js command-palette.js widget-bridge.js fab-menu.js ai-service.js biometric-lock.js store.js supabase-config.js supabase-client.js supabase-auth.js supabase-api.js supabase-importer.js components/empty-state.js components/icon-packs.js; do [ -f "$f" ] && npx esbuild "$f" --minify --legal-comments=none --outfile="../www/$f" || true; done
scripts.build:css: cd web && for f in *.css styles/*.css; do [ -f "$f" ] && npx esbuild "$f" --minify --loader:.css=css --outfile="../www/$f" || true; done
scripts.build:assets: cp web/*.html web/*.png web/*.svg web/manifest.json www/ 2>/dev/null || true && (cp web/.nojekyll www/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -r web/assets www/ 2>/dev/null || true && (cp -r web/plans www/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r web/extensions www/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:capacitor && npm run build:main && npm run build:views && npm run build:css && npm run build:assets
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android: npm run sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
